Experiments

Things worth trying

A running log of experiments — some live, some in progress, some just ideas. Status is honest.

Live

Data / Politics

Florida Politics

An interactive exploration of how Florida has shifted politically over time. Tracks gubernatorial primary and general election results by county alongside legislative party balance from 1992 to 2024.

View experiment

Tool

Where Now?

A decision-killer for Lisbon. When you don't know where to go, this decides for you.

View experiment
